final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing cinematic still of an anime-style basketball slam-dunk scene.

Style/medium: anime cel-shaded illustration with dynamic action lines, sports manga aesthetic in the spirit of Slam Dunk or Kuroko's Basketball
Composition: low-angle hero shot from below the rim, 24mm wide-angle lens, player mid-air at peak dunk height, motion blur on limbs and ball
Subject: athletic basketball player in mid-air slam dunk pose, intense facial expression, sweat droplets flying off body, muscles tensed, jersey and shorts flowing with movement
Scene/backdrop: indoor basketball court arena, blurred cheering crowd in stands, camera flashes popping in background, scoreboard visible but out of focus
Lighting/mood: dramatic arena spotlights from above, rim lights creating silhouette edges, high contrast shadows, energetic and intense atmosphere
Color palette: warm court wood tones as base, cool blue/purple arena shadows, bright white flash accents, player's jersey as saturated focal point
Materials/textures: clean cel-shaded skin with minimal gradients, crisp line art, motion blur streaks on extremities, glossy sweat beads
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, 3D CGI look, deformed anatomy, muddy colors, generic stock photo aesthetic, 8K stuffer words
